title: Ham n' Cheese
description: Adds tasty ham n' cheese items
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CoffeeCatRailway/HamNCheese/pollen/1.18.x/forge/src/main/resources/icon.png)

This mod adds in lots of ham and cheese related foods, plus lots more to come!
We've been through a lot of changes & iterations but, now everything is here to stay!

#### General Info
For support ask on Discord! [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/416514612977205248?label=discord&logo=discord&color=7289da)](https://discord.gg/ueCBEZjVcB)  
This mod requires Pollen for 1.18 & up! [![Pollen](https://cdn.moonflower.gg/curse/badge/anchor/requires_pollen.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pollen)   
I also upload on CurseForge! [![Downloads](http://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_273214_downloads.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hamncheese)


#### **Compatability:**
* Just Enough Items (Forge (1.18.+) & Fabric (1.18.2))
* Roughly Enough Items (Fabric only 1.18.1)
* The One Probe (Not supported past 1.16)
* WTHIT (1.18 & up, Forge & Fabric)

#### **Features:**
* Sandwich & Crackers - Make your own sandwich or have a cracker as a snack
* Popcorn machine - Includes different flavours
* Grill - Toast sandwiches
* Pizza - Make/cook your own pizza
* New Crops - Pineapple, tomato & corn
* Mice - Protect your food storage!
* Chef - Find a village with a restaurant

#### **Coming Up:**
* Cheese curdler block (Possible create compatability)
* Possibly more foods

##### Modpacks: You are free to use Ham N' Cheese in your pack(s)
